title: Fractal Mehler kernels and nonlinear geometric flows
summary: In this paper we introduce a two-parameter family of Mehler kernels and connect them to a class of Baouendi-Grushin flows in fractal dimension. We also highlight a link with a geometric fully nonlinear equation and formulate two questions.

AI.tldr: 该论文引入了一个双参数Mehler核族，并将其与分形维数中的Baouendi-Grushin流联系起来，同时建立了与几何完全非线性方程的联系。
AI.motivation: 研究背景涉及Mehler核的推广及其与几何流和非线性方程的连接。核心动机是建立分形维数中Baouendi-Grushin流与经典热核之间的桥梁，探索几何分析与偏微分方程的新联系。
AI.techniques: 主要使用参数化方法构建Mehler核族，通过分析连接技术将热核理论与几何流理论相结合，可能涉及分形几何、几何测度论和完全非线性偏微分方程的分析工具。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 构造了一个双参数Mehler核族；2. 建立了该核族与分形维数中Baouendi-Grushin流的对应关系；3. 揭示了与几何完全非线性方程的联系；4. 提出了两个待解决的数学问题。
AI.significance: 这项工作在热核理论、几何流和完全非线性方程之间建立了新的桥梁，为研究分形几何中的偏微分方程提供了新视角，可能对几何分析、数学物理和偏微分方程理论产生重要影响。

title: A nonlinear instability result to the Navier-Stokes equations with Navier slip boundary conditions
summary: In this paper, we investigate the instability of the trivial steady states to the incompressible viscous fluid with Navier-slip boundary conditions. For the linear instability, the existence of infinitely many normal mode solutions to the linearized equations is shown via the operator method of Lafitte and Nguyen (2022). Hence, we prove the nonlinear instability by adapting the framework of Desjardins and Grenier (2003) studying some classes of viscous boundary layers to obtain two separated solutions at escaping time. Our work performs a different approach from that of Ding, Li and Xin (2018).

AI.tldr: 证明了具有Navier滑移边界条件的不可压缩粘性流体平凡稳态解的线性与非线性不稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究Navier滑移边界条件下不可压缩粘性流体平凡稳态解的不稳定性问题，特别是针对Ding, Li和Xin(2018)工作的不同方法
AI.techniques: 采用Lafitte和Nguyen(2022)的算子方法证明线性不稳定性，运用Desjardins和Grenier(2003)研究粘性边界层的框架证明非线性不稳定性
AI.main_theorems: 1. 通过算子方法证明线性化方程存在无穷多正规模解；2. 通过分离解方法在逃逸时间获得两个分离解，从而证明非线性不稳定性
AI.significance: 为Navier滑移边界条件下流体稳定性理论提供了新的分析方法，扩展了粘性边界层不稳定性理论，与已有工作形成对比和补充

title: A regularity theory for second-order parabolic partial differential equations in weighted mixed norm Sobolev-Zygmund spaces
summary: We develop an optimal regularity theory for parabolic partial differential equations in weighted mixed norm Sobolev-Zygmund spaces. The results extend the classical Schauder estimates to coefficients that are merely measurable in time and to the critical case of integer-order regularity. In addition, nonzero initial data are treated in the optimal trace space via a sharp trace theorem.

AI.tldr: 发展了加权混合范数Sobolev-Zygmund空间中抛物型偏微分方程的最优正则性理论
AI.motivation: 经典Schauder估计要求系数具有时间连续性，本文旨在将理论扩展到系数仅时间可测的情形，并处理整数阶正则性的临界情况
AI.techniques: 使用加权混合范数Sobolev-Zygmund空间理论，发展尖锐的迹定理处理非零初始数据
AI.main_theorems: 建立了抛物型PDE在加权混合范数空间中的最优正则性估计，将Schauder估计推广到时间仅可测系数和整数阶正则性临界情形
AI.significance: 显著扩展了抛物型方程正则性理论的应用范围，为处理更一般的系数和初始数据提供了理论框架

title: $L^p$ Estimates for Numerical Approximation of Hamilton-Jacobi Equations
summary: We establish $L^p$ error estimates for monotone numerical schemes approximating Hamilton-Jacobi equations on the $d$-dimensional torus. Using the adjoint method, we first prove a $L^1$ error bound of order one for finite-difference and semi-Lagrangian schemes under standard convexity assumptions on the Hamiltonian. By interpolation, we also obtain $L^p$ estimates for every finite $p>1$. Our analysis covers a broad class of schemes, improves several existing results, and provides a unified framework for discrete error estimates.

AI.tldr: 建立了单调数值格式逼近d维环面上Hamilton-Jacobi方程的L^p误差估计
AI.motivation: Hamilton-Jacobi方程在最优控制、几何光学等领域有广泛应用，数值求解需要误差估计理论。现有结果有限，需要建立更一般、更精确的误差估计框架。
AI.techniques: 使用伴随方法(adjoint method)证明L^1误差估计；通过插值技术获得L^p估计；适用于有限差分和半拉格朗日格式；要求Hamiltonian满足标准凸性条件。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在标准凸性假设下，有限差分和半拉格朗日格式的L^1误差界为一阶精度；2. 通过插值得到所有有限p>1的L^p误差估计；3. 建立了广泛的单调格式误差估计统一框架。
AI.significance: 改进了现有误差估计结果，提供了更一般的理论框架；为Hamilton-Jacobi方程的数值分析建立了统一的误差估计方法；对最优控制、几何光学等应用领域的数值计算有重要理论指导意义。

title: Propagation of chaos for the homogeneous Boltzmann equation with moderately soft potentials
summary: We show that the Kac particle system converges, as the number of particles tends to infinity, to the solution of the homogeneous Boltzmann equation, in the regime of moderately soft potentials, $γ\in (-2,0)$ with the common notation. This proves the propagation of chaos. We adapt the recent work of Imbert, Silvestre and Villani, to show that the Fisher information is nonincreasing in time along solutions to the Kac master equation. This estimate allows us to control the singularity of the interaction.

AI.tldr: 证明了Kac粒子系统在中等软势能下收敛到齐次Boltzmann方程解，实现了混沌传播
AI.motivation: 研究Kac粒子系统在热力学极限下向Boltzmann方程的收敛性，特别是在中等软势能（γ∈(-2,0)）情形下，验证混沌传播假设
AI.techniques: 采用Imbert、Silvestre和Villani的最新方法，通过Fisher信息沿Kac主方程解的时间单调性来控制相互作用的奇异性
AI.main_theorems: 证明了Kac粒子系统在粒子数趋于无穷时收敛到齐次Boltzmann方程解，建立了Fisher信息的时间单调性估计
AI.significance: 为中等软势能下的Boltzmann方程提供了严格的微观推导，深化了对稀薄气体动力学和混沌传播理论的理解

title: Dirac solitons in one-dimensional nonlinear Schrödinger equations
comment: 39 pages, 1 Figure. Keywords: Dirac solitons, Dirac points, NLS equations, NLD equations, standing waves, periodic Schrödinger operators
summary: In this paper we study a family of one-dimensional stationary cubic nonlinear Schrödinger (NLS) equations with periodic potentials and linear part displaying Dirac points in the dispersion relation. By introducing a suitable periodic perturbation, one can open a spectral gap around the Dirac-point energy. This allows to construct standing waves of the NLS equation whose leading-order profile is a modulation of Bloch waves by means of the components of a spinor solving an appropriate cubic nonlinear Dirac (NLD) equation. We refer to these solutions as Dirac solitons. Our analysis thus provides a rigorous justification for the use of the NLD equation as an effective model for the original NLS equation.

AI.tldr: 该论文为具有狄拉克点的周期势非线性薛定谔方程中的狄拉克孤子提供了严格数学构造和有效模型验证。
AI.motivation: 研究具有周期势的一维定态三次非线性薛定谔方程，其线性部分在色散关系中显示狄拉克点，通过引入周期扰动打开狄拉克点附近的谱隙，旨在构造狄拉克孤子并验证非线性狄拉克方程作为有效模型的合理性。
AI.techniques: 使用周期扰动打开谱隙，通过布洛赫波调制构造驻波解，将非线性薛定谔方程约化到非线性狄拉克方程，采用渐近分析和严格数学证明方法。
AI.main_theorems: 构造了狄拉克孤子解，其主导项由求解适当三次非线性狄拉克方程的旋量分量调制的布洛赫波组成，并严格证明了非线性狄拉克方程作为原非线性薛定谔方程有效模型的合理性。
AI.significance: 为具有狄拉克点的周期势系统中的非线性波现象提供了严格的数学基础，验证了非线性狄拉克方程作为有效模型的适用性，对凝聚态物理和光学中的拓扑材料研究有重要意义。

title: An Equivalence Result on the Order of Differentiability in Frobenius' Theorem
summary: This paper examines the simplest case of total differential equations that appears in the theory of foliation structures, without imposing the smoothness assumptions. This leads to a peculiar asymmetry in the differentiability of solutions. To resolve this asymmetry, this paper focuses on the differentiability of the integral manifold. When the system is locally Lipschitz, a solution is ensured to be only locally Lipschitz, but the integral manifolds must be $C^1$. When the system is $C^k$, we can only ensure the existence of a $C^k$ solution, but the integral manifolds must be $C^{k+1}$. In addition, we see a counterexample in which the system is $C^1$, but there is no $C^2$ solution. Moreover, we characterize a minimizer of an optimization problem whose objective function is a quasi-convex solution to a total differential equation. In this connection, we examine two necessary and sufficient conditions for the system in which any solution is quasi-convex.

AI.tldr: 研究全微分方程解的正则性不对称现象，揭示解与积分流形光滑度之间的系统差异，并给出拟凸解的优化问题特征。
AI.motivation: 在叶状结构理论中，全微分方程解的正则性存在不对称现象：即使系统本身光滑度有限，积分流形却具有更高的光滑性。本文旨在系统研究这种不对称性，并探讨拟凸解在优化问题中的应用。
AI.techniques: 使用局部Lipschitz分析、微分流形理论、正则性提升技术，构造反例证明正则性界限，并应用拟凸函数理论分析优化问题。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 局部Lipschitz系统确保解仅局部Lipschitz，但积分流形必须是C¹的；2) Cᵏ系统确保Cᵏ解存在，但积分流形必须是Cᵏ⁺¹的；3) 构造C¹系统无C²解的反例；4) 刻画全微分方程拟凸解优化问题的极小化子。
AI.significance: 揭示了全微分方程解正则性的深层结构，为叶状结构理论提供新的正则性结果，对几何分析和偏微分方程理论有重要贡献，并为拟凸优化问题提供新的分析框架。

title: Multi-bump solutions for sublinear elliptic equations with nonsymmetric coefficients
summary: We investigate the existence of nonnegative bump solutions to the sublinear elliptic equation \[ \begin{cases} -Δv - K(x)v + |v|^{q-2}v = 0 & \text{in } \mathbb{R}^N, \\ v(x) \to 0 & \text{as } |x| \to \infty, \end{cases} \] where $q \in (1,2)$, $ N \geq 2$, and the potential $K \in L^p_{\mathrm{loc}}(\mathbb{R}^N)$ with $p > N/2$ is a function without any symmetry assumptions. Under the condition that $\|K - 1\|_{L^p_{\mathrm{loc}}}$ is sufficiently small, we construct infinitely many solutions with arbitrarily many bumps. The construction is challenged by the sensitive interaction between bumps, whose limiting profiles have compact support. The key to ensuring their effective separation lies in obtaining sharp estimates of the support sets. Our method, based on a truncated functional space, provides precisely such control. We derive qualitative local stability estimates in region-wise maximum norms that govern the size of each bump's essential support, confining its core to a designated region and minimizing overlap. Crucially, these estimates are uniform in the number of bumps, which is the pivotal step in establishing the existence of solutions with infinitely many bumps.

AI.tldr: 在无对称性假设的亚线性椭圆方程中，构造了具有任意多峰的非负bump解
AI.motivation: 研究亚线性椭圆方程非负bump解的存在性，其中势函数K无对称性假设，且指数q∈(1,2)为亚线性情形，挑战在于峰之间的敏感相互作用
AI.techniques: 基于截断函数空间的构造方法，获得支撑集的精确估计，推导区域极大范数下的定性局部稳定性估计，控制每个峰的支撑集大小
AI.main_theorems: 当‖K-1‖_{L^p_loc}足够小时，构造了无穷多个具有任意多峰的解，这些估计与峰的数量无关，是构造无穷多峰解的关键
AI.significance: 突破了传统对称性假设的限制，为亚线性椭圆方程的多峰解理论提供了新方法，支撑集控制技术对理解非线性方程的空间结构有重要意义

title: Mean-Field Limits of Deterministic and Stochastic Flocking Models with Nonlinear Velocity Alignment
summary:
We study the mean-field limit for a class of agent-based models describing flocking with nonlinear velocity alignment. Each agent interacts through a communication protocol $φ$ and a non-linear coupling of velocities given by the power law $A(\bv) = |\bv|^{p-2}\bv$, $p > 2$. The mean-field limit is proved in two settings -- deterministic and stochastic. We then provide quantitative estimates on propagation of chaos for deterministic case in the case of the classical fat-tailed kernels, showing an improved convergence rate of the $k$-particle marginals to a solution of the corresponding Vlasov equation. The stochastic version is addressed with multiplicative noise depending on the local interaction intensity, which leads to the associated Fokker-Planck-Alignment equation.
  Our results extend the classical Cucker-Smale theory to the nonlinear framework which has received considerable attention in the literature recently.

AI.tldr: 该论文将经典的Cucker-Smale群体动力学模型推广到非线性速度耦合框架，建立了确定性和随机性两种设置下的平均场极限理论。
AI.motivation: 研究基于智能体的群体动力学模型，其中个体通过通信协议φ和非线性速度耦合进行交互。非线性耦合采用幂律形式A(v)=|v|^{p-2}v，p>2。该研究旨在将经典的Cucker-Smale理论推广到非线性框架，这一框架在近期文献中受到广泛关注。
AI.techniques: 使用平均场极限方法，包括确定性和随机性两种设置的分析。在确定性情况下，针对经典肥尾核函数提供了混沌传播的定量估计。在随机性情况下，处理依赖于局部交互强度的乘性噪声，推导相应的Fokker-Planck-Alignment方程。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明了确定性和随机性两种设置下的平均场极限存在性；2. 在确定性情况下，针对肥尾核函数给出了k-粒子边缘分布到相应Vlasov方程解的改进收敛速率；3. 在随机性情况下，建立了与Fokker-Planck-Alignment方程的对应关系。
AI.significance: 将经典的Cucker-Smale群体动力学理论推广到非线性框架，为非线性速度耦合的群体行为建模提供了严格的数学基础。结果对理解复杂群体动力学、非局部偏微分方程理论以及随机动力学系统有重要理论意义。

title: Stability of the reconstruction of the heat reflection coefficient in the phonon transport equation
summary: The reflection coefficient is an important thermal property of materials, especially at the nanoscale, and determining this property requires solving an inverse problem based on macroscopic temperature measurements. In this manuscript, we investigate the stability of this inverse problem to infer the reflection coefficient in the phonon transport equation. We show that the problem becomes ill-posed as the system transitions from the ballistic to the diffusive regime, characterized by the Knudsen number converging to zero. Such a stability estimate clarifies the discrepancy observed in previous studies on the well-posedness of this inverse problem. Furthermore, we quantify the rate at which the stability deteriorates with respect to the Knudsen number and confirm the theoretical result with numerical evidence.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了从宏观温度测量反演声子输运方程中反射系数的逆问题的稳定性，揭示了从弹道到扩散区域过渡时问题的不适定性。
AI.motivation: 反射系数是材料的重要热学性质，尤其在纳米尺度下，确定该性质需要基于宏观温度测量解决逆问题。先前研究对该逆问题的适定性存在分歧，需要澄清。
AI.techniques: 使用稳定性分析方法，研究Knudsen数趋近于零时逆问题的适定性变化，结合理论分析和数值验证。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了该逆问题在从弹道区域过渡到扩散区域时变得不适定，量化了稳定性随Knudsen数恶化的速率，并通过数值证据验证了理论结果。
AI.significance: 澄清了先前研究中关于该逆问题适定性的分歧，为纳米尺度热输运中材料性质的反演提供了理论指导，对纳米热管理技术有重要意义。

title: Solvability conditions for some non-Fredholm operators with shifted arguments
summary: In the first part of the article we establish the existence in the sense of sequences of solutions in $H^{2}(R)$ for some nonhomogeneous linear differential equation in which one of the terms has the argument translated by a constant. It is shown that under the reasonable technical conditions the convergence in $L^{2}(R)$ of the source terms implies the existence and the convergence in $H^{2}(R)$ of the solutions. The second part of the work deals with the solvability in the sense of sequences in $H^{2}(R)$ of the integro-differential equation in which one of the terms has the argument shifted by a constant. It is demonstrated that under the appropriate auxiliary assumptions the convergence in $L^{1}(R)$ of the integral kernels yields the existence and the convergence in $H^{2}(R)$ of the solutions. Both equations considered involve the second order differential operator with or without the Fredholm property depending on the value of the constant by which the argument gets translated.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有平移项的线性微分方程和积分微分方程在序列意义下解的存在性和收敛性结果
AI.motivation: 研究具有平移项的非齐次线性微分方程和积分微分方程在序列意义下的可解性问题，这类方程涉及平移算子，其Fredholm性质依赖于平移常数
AI.techniques: 序列收敛方法、函数空间理论（H²(R)、L²(R)、L¹(R)）、平移算子分析、Fredholm理论、积分核收敛技术
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对于具有平移项的线性微分方程，证明了源项在L²(R)中的收敛性蕴含解在H²(R)中的存在性和收敛性；2. 对于具有平移项的积分微分方程，证明了积分核在L¹(R)中的收敛性蕴含解在H²(R)中的存在性和收敛性
AI.significance: 为具有平移项的微分方程和积分微分方程提供了系统的可解性理论框架，建立了源项/核函数收敛性与解收敛性之间的对应关系，对处理非局部算子方程具有重要意义

title: Steady Self-Propelled Motion of a Rigid Body in a Viscous Fluid with Navier-Slip Boundary Conditions
summary: We investigate the steady self-propelled motion of a rigid body immersed in a three-dimensional incompressible viscous fluid governed by the Navier-Stokes equations. The analysis is performed in a body-fixed reference frame, so that the fluid occupies an exterior domain and the propulsion mechanism is modeled through nonhomogeneous Navier-slip boundary conditions at the fluid-body interface. Such conditions provide a realistic description of propulsion in microfluidic and rough-surface regimes, where partial slip effects are significant. Under suitable smallness assumptions on the boundary flux and on the normal component of the prescribed surface velocity, we establish the existence of weak steady solutions to the coupled fluid-structure system. A key analytical ingredient is the derivation of a Korn-type inequality adapted to exterior domains with rigid-body motion and Navier-slip interfaces, which yields uniform control of both the fluid velocity and the translational and rotational velocities of the body. Beyond existence, we provide a necessary and sufficient condition under which a prescribed slip velocity on the body surface induces nontrivial translational or rotational motion of the rigid body. This is achieved through the introduction of a finite-dimensional thrust space, defined via auxiliary exterior Stokes problems with Navier boundary conditions, which captures the effective contribution of boundary-driven flows to the rigid-body motion. Our results clarify how boundary effects generate propulsion and extend the classical Dirichlet-based theory to the Navier-slip setting.

AI.tldr: 建立了三维Navier-Stokes方程下具有Navier滑移边界条件的刚体自推进稳态弱解的存在性理论
AI.motivation: 研究微流体和粗糙表面条件下刚体在粘性流体中的自推进运动，Navier滑移边界条件比经典Dirichlet边界条件更符合物理实际，需要建立相应的数学理论框架
AI.techniques: 采用体固参考系，推导适用于外区域和Navier滑移边界的Korn型不等式，引入有限维推力空间概念，通过辅助外部Stokes问题分析边界驱动流对刚体运动的有效贡献
AI.main_theorems: 在边界通量和法向速度分量足够小的条件下，证明了耦合流体-结构系统稳态弱解的存在性；建立了边界滑移速度产生非平凡刚体运动的充要条件
AI.significance: 将经典的Dirichlet边界理论推广到Navier滑移边界情形，阐明了边界效应如何产生推进力，为微尺度流体动力学和生物推进机制提供了严格的数学基础

title: Anomalous Dissipation at Onsager-Critical Regularity
summary: We construct solutions to the three-dimensional Euler equations exhibiting anomalous dissipation in finite time through a vanishing viscosity limit. Inspired by \cite{BDL23} and \cite{cheskidov2023dissipation}, we extend the \(2\frac{1}{2}\)-dimensional constructions and establish an Onsager-critical energy criterion adapted to such flows, showing its sharpness. Moreover, we provide a fully three-dimensional dissipative Euler example, sharp in Onsager's sense, driven by a slightly rough external force, following the framework of \cite{CL21}.

AI.tldr: 构造了三维欧拉方程在有限时间内表现出反常耗散的解，通过消失粘性极限实现，并建立了Onsager临界能量准则。
AI.motivation: 研究三维欧拉方程在湍流中的能量耗散现象，特别是反常耗散（anomalous dissipation）问题。受到BDL23和cheskidov2023dissipation等工作的启发，旨在扩展2½维构造到完全三维情形，并建立适用于此类流动的Onsager临界能量准则。
AI.techniques: 使用消失粘性极限方法构造解；扩展2½维构造到三维；建立适应于此类流动的Onsager临界能量准则；采用CL21框架处理粗糙外力驱动的三维耗散欧拉方程。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 构造了三维欧拉方程在有限时间内表现出反常耗散的解；2. 建立了适用于此类流动的Onsager临界能量准则并证明其尖锐性；3. 提供了完全三维的耗散欧拉方程示例，在Onsager意义下是尖锐的，由略微粗糙的外力驱动。
AI.significance: 为湍流中的能量耗散机制提供了严格的数学框架；将反常耗散现象从2½维推广到完全三维；建立了Onsager临界能量准则的尖锐性结果；对理解三维不可压缩欧拉方程的奇异性和能量守恒问题有重要意义。

title: Propagation of space-time singularities for perturbed harmonic oscillators
summary: We discuss propagation of space-time singularities for the quantum harmonic oscillator with time-dependent metric and potential perturbations. Reformulating the quasi-homogeneous wave front set according to Lascar (1977) in a semiclassical manner, we obtain a characterization of its appearance in comparison with the unperturbed system. The idea of our proof is based on the argument of Nakamura (2009), which was originally devised for the analysis of spatial singularities of the Schrödinger equation, however, the application is non-trivial since the time is no more a parameter, but takes a part in the base variables.

AI.tldr: 将Lascar的拟齐次波前集半经典化，研究含时扰动量子谐振子时空奇点的传播特性
AI.motivation: 研究含时度规和势场扰动的量子谐振子系统中时空奇点的传播问题，将经典奇点分析推广到含时扰动情形
AI.techniques: 将Lascar的拟齐次波前集概念半经典化，基于Nakamura分析薛定谔方程空间奇点的方法，处理时间作为基变量的非平凡推广
AI.main_theorems: 建立了含时扰动量子谐振子时空奇点传播的刻画，比较了扰动系统与未扰动系统的奇点出现特性
AI.significance: 将奇点传播理论推广到含时扰动系统，为量子动力学中时空奇点分析提供新框架，连接了经典奇点理论与量子系统

title: Phase transition thresholds and chiral magnetic fields of general degree
summary: We study a variational problem for the Landau--Lifshitz energy with Dzyaloshinskii--Moriya interactions arising in 2D micromagnetics, focusing on the Bogomol'nyi regime. We first determine the minimal energy for arbitrary topological degree, thereby revealing two types of phase transitions consistent with physical observations. In addition, we prove the uniqueness of the energy minimizer in degrees $0$ and $-1$, and nonexistence of minimizers for all other degrees. Finally, we show that the homogeneous state remains stable even beyond the threshold at which the skyrmion loses stability, and we uncover a new stability transition driven by the Zeeman energy.

AI.tldr: 该论文确定了二维微磁学中Landau-Lifshitz能量与Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用在Bogomol'nyi机制下的最小能量，揭示了两种相变类型，证明了特定拓扑度下能量极小元的唯一性和不存在性，并发现了齐次态的新稳定性转变。
AI.motivation: 研究二维微磁学中Landau-Lifshitz能量与Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用的变分问题，聚焦于Bogomol'nyi机制，旨在理解磁性材料中拓扑缺陷（如斯格明子）的稳定性、相变和能量最小化行为。
AI.techniques: 变分方法、拓扑度理论、能量最小化技术、稳定性分析、相变理论，特别利用了Bogomol'nyi分解技术来研究能量下界和极小元的存在性。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 确定了任意拓扑度下的最小能量；2. 揭示了两种与物理观测一致的相变类型；3. 证明了拓扑度为0和-1时能量极小元的唯一性；4. 证明了所有其他拓扑度下极小元不存在；5. 发现齐次态在斯格明子失稳阈值后仍保持稳定；6. 揭示了由Zeeman能量驱动的新稳定性转变。
AI.significance: 该工作为二维磁性材料中拓扑缺陷的稳定性提供了严格的数学基础，揭示了新的相变机制，对理解斯格明子等拓扑磁结构的形成、稳定性和相变行为具有重要理论意义，为磁性材料的设计和应用提供了数学指导。

title: Half-space minimizing solutions of a two dimensional Allen-Cahn system
summary:
This paper studies minimizing solutions to a two dimensional Allen-Cahn system on the upper half plane, subject to Dirichlet boundary conditions, \begin{equation*}
  Δu-\nabla_u W(u)=0, \quad u: \mathbb{R}_+^2\to \mathbb{R}^2,\ u=u_0 \text{ on } \partial \mathbb{R}_+^2, \end{equation*} where $W: \mathbb{R}^2\to [0,\infty)$ is a multi-well potential. We give a complete classification of such half-space minimizing solutions in terms of their blow-down limits at infinity. In addition, we characterize the asymptotic behavior of solutions near the associated sharp interfaces.

AI.tldr: 对上半平面Allen-Cahn系统极小化解的完整分类，基于无穷远处的blow-down极限
AI.motivation: 研究二维上半平面上带Dirichlet边界条件的Allen-Cahn系统极小化解，该系统描述相变界面，多井势能W导致多个平衡态
AI.techniques: blow-down极限分析、界面渐近行为分析、变分方法、相场模型理论
AI.main_theorems: 1. 基于无穷远处blow-down极限对上半平面极小化解的完整分类；2. 对尖锐界面附近解渐近行为的刻画
AI.significance: 为相变界面理论提供严格数学基础，深化对边界条件下Allen-Cahn系统解结构的理解，对材料科学中的相分离现象有重要应用价值

title: A unified spatiotemporal formulation with physics-preserving structure for time-dependent convection-diffusion problems
summary: We propose a unified four-dimensional (4D) spatiotemporal formulation for time-dependent convection-diffusion problems that preserves underlying physical structures. By treating time as an additional space-like coordinate, the evolution problem is reformulated as a stationary convection-diffusion equation on a 4D space-time domain. Using exterior calculus, we extend this framework to the full family of convection-diffusion problems posed on $H(\textbf{grad})$, $H(\textbf{curl})$, and $H(\text{div})$. The resulting formulation is based on a 4D Hodge-Laplacian operator with a spatiotemporal diffusion tensor and convection field, augmented by a small temporal perturbation to ensure nondegeneracy. This formulation naturally incorporates fundamental physical constraints, including divergence-free and curl-free conditions. We further introduce an exponentially-fitted 4D spatiotemporal flux operator that symmetrizes the convection-diffusion operator and enables a well-posed variational formulation. Finally, we prove that the temporally-perturbed formulation converges to the original time-dependent convection-diffusion model as the perturbation parameter tends to zero.

AI.tldr: 提出统一的四维时空公式用于含时对流扩散问题，保持物理结构并扩展到H(grad)、H(curl)和H(div)问题族
AI.motivation: 含时对流扩散问题在物理和工程中广泛存在，传统方法难以统一处理不同空间算子（梯度、旋度、散度）的问题，且难以保持底层物理结构
AI.techniques: 将时间作为类空间坐标的四维时空重构；外微积分框架；Hodge-Laplace算子；时空扩散张量和对流场；指数拟合通量算子；变分公式
AI.main_theorems: 1) 建立了统一的四维时空公式，覆盖H(grad)、H(curl)、H(div)问题族；2) 引入指数拟合通量算子实现对称化；3) 证明时间扰动公式在扰动参数趋于零时收敛到原始模型
AI.significance: 为含时对流扩散问题提供了统一的数学框架，保持物理结构，支持变分公式，为数值方法（如有限元）提供了理论基础

title: $L_p$-estimates for nonlocal equations with general Lévy measures
summary:
We consider nonlocal operators of the form \begin{equation*}
  L_t u(x) = \int_{\mathbb{R}^d} \left( u(x+y)-u(x)-\nabla u(x)\cdot y^{(σ)} \right) ν_t(dy), \end{equation*} where $ν_t$ is a general Lévy measure of order $σ\in(0,2)$. We allow this class of Lévy measures to be very singular and impose no regularity assumptions in the time variable. Continuity of the operators and the unique strong solvability of the corresponding nonlocal parabolic equations in $L_p$ spaces are established. We also demonstrate that, depending on the ranges of $σ$ and $d$, the operator can or cannot be treated in weighted mixed-norm spaces.

AI.tldr: 建立了奇异Lévy测度非局部算子在L_p空间中的连续性和相应抛物方程的唯一强解性
AI.motivation: 研究一类非常奇异的非局部算子，其Lévy测度ν_t在时间变量上无正则性假设，这类算子出现在许多应用问题中，但现有理论对这类奇异测度处理不足
AI.techniques: 使用非局部算子理论、Lévy过程分析、L_p空间估计、加权混合范数空间方法，以及处理奇异测度的特殊技术
AI.main_theorems: 1) 证明了算子L_t在L_p空间中的连续性；2) 建立了相应非局部抛物方程在L_p空间中的唯一强解性；3) 分析了算子在不同σ和d取值下在加权混合范数空间中的可处理性
AI.significance: 扩展了非局部算子理论，为处理奇异Lévy测度的抛物方程提供了理论基础，在随机过程、金融数学和物理建模中有重要应用

title: Global spherically symmetric classical solutions for arbitrary large initial data of the multi-dimensional non-isentropic compressible Navier-Stokes equations
summary: In 1871, Saint-Venant introduced the shallow water equations. Since then, the global classical solutions for arbitrary large initial data of the multi-dimensional viscous Saint-Venant system have remained a well-known open problem. It was only recently that [Huang-Meng-Zhang, http:arXiv:2512.15029, 2025], under the assumption of radial symmetry, first proved the existence of global classical solutions for arbitrary large initial data to the initial-boundary value problem of the two-dimensional viscous shallow water equations. At the same time, [Chen-Zhang-Zhu, http:arXiv:2512.18545, 2025] also independently proved the existence of global large solutions to the Cauchy problem of this system. Notably, in the work of Huang-Meng-Zhang, they also established the existence of global classical solutions for arbitrary large initial data to the isentropic compressible Navier-Stokes equations satisfying the BD entropy equality in both two and three dimensions, and the viscous shallow water equations are precisely a specific class of isentropic compressible fluids subject to the BD entropy equality. In this paper, we prove a new BD entropy inequality for a class of non-isentropic compressible fluids, which can be regarded as a generalization of the shallow water equations with transported entropy. Employing new estimates on the lower bound of density different from that of Huang-Meng-Zhang's work, we show the "viscous shallow water system with transport entropy" will admit global classical solutions for arbitrary large initial data to the spherically symmetric initial-boundary value problem in both two and three dimensions. Our results also relax the restrictions on the dimension and adiabatic index imposed in Huang-Meng-Zhang's work on the shallow water equations, extending the range from $N=2,\ γ\ge \frac{3}{2}$ to $N=2,\ γ> 1$ and $N=3,\ 1<γ<3$.

AI.tldr: 证明了带输运熵的粘性浅水方程在球对称条件下对任意大初值存在全局经典解
AI.motivation: 自1871年Saint-Venant引入浅水方程以来，多维粘性Saint-Venant系统对任意大初值的全局经典解一直是一个著名的开放问题。最近Huang-Meng-Zhang在径向对称假设下首次证明了二维粘性浅水方程初边值问题的全局经典解存在性，但他们的结果在维数和绝热指数上有严格限制。
AI.techniques: 建立了非等熵可压缩流体的一类新BD熵不等式，采用了不同于Huang-Meng-Zhang工作的密度下界估计方法，将浅水方程推广到带输运熵的情形
AI.main_theorems: 证明了"带输运熵的粘性浅水系统"在二维和三维球对称初边值问题中对任意大初值存在全局经典解，将维数和绝热指数的范围从$N=2,\ γ\ge \frac{3}{2}$扩展到$N=2,\ γ> 1$和$N=3,\ 1<γ<3$
AI.significance: 这是对粘性浅水方程全局解理论的重大推进，首次在三维情况下建立了带输运熵的浅水方程的全局经典解存在性，并显著放宽了维数和绝热指数的限制，为更一般的可压缩流体系统研究提供了新工具

title: Hölder continuity of weak solutions to the thin-film equation in $d=2$
summary: The thin-film equation $\partial_t u = -\nabla \cdot (u^n \nabla Δu)$ describes the evolution of the height $u=u(x,t)\geq 0$ of a viscous thin liquid film spreading on a flat solid surface. We prove Hölder continuity of energy-dissipating weak solutions to the thin-film equation in the physically most relevant case of two spatial dimensions $d=2$. While an extensive existence theory of weak solutions to the thin-film equation was established more than two decades ago, even boundedness of weak solutions in $d=2$ has remained a major unsolved problem in the theory of the thin-film equation. Due the fourth-order structure of the thin-film equation, De Giorgi-Nash-Moser theory is not applicable. Our proof is based on the hole-filling technique, the challenge being posed by the degenerate parabolicity of the fourth-order PDE.

AI.tldr: 证明了二维薄层方程能量耗散弱解的Hölder连续性，解决了该领域长期存在的关键问题
AI.motivation: 薄层方程描述了粘性薄液膜在固体表面铺展的演化过程，二维情况是物理上最相关的。虽然弱解的存在性理论在二十多年前已建立，但即使在二维情况下弱解的有界性也一直是未解决的主要问题
AI.techniques: 使用洞填充技术，克服了四阶PDE的退化抛物性带来的挑战；由于方程的四阶结构，De Giorgi-Nash-Moser理论不适用
AI.main_theorems: 证明了二维薄层方程能量耗散弱解的Hölder连续性，解决了弱解有界性这一长期未决问题
AI.significance: 填补了薄层方程理论的重要空白，为物理上最相关的二维情况提供了正则性理论，对理解粘性薄膜动力学有重要意义

title: Bol's type inequality for singular metrics and its application to prescribing $Q$-curvature problems
summary: In this article, we study higher-order Bol's inequality for radial normal solutions to a singular Liouville equation. By applying these inequalities along with compactness arguments, we derive necessary and sufficient conditions for the existence of radial normal solutions to a singular $Q$-curvature problem. Moreover, under suitable assumptions on the $Q$-curvature, we obtain uniform bounds on the total $Q$-curvature.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过建立高阶Bol不等式并应用紧性论证，研究了奇异Liouville方程径向正规解的存在性条件和总Q-曲率的一致界。
AI.motivation: 研究奇异Liouville方程的径向正规解，特别是针对奇异Q-曲率问题，旨在建立解的存在性条件和曲率的一致界估计。
AI.techniques: 高阶Bol不等式、紧性论证、径向对称性分析、奇异椭圆方程的正则性理论。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 奇异Q-曲率问题径向正规解存在的充分必要条件；2. 在适当假设下总Q-曲率的一致界估计。
AI.significance: 扩展了Bol不等式在奇异椭圆方程中的应用，为奇异Q-曲率问题的解的存在性和正则性提供了新的理论框架，对共形几何中的曲率流问题有重要意义。

title: Boundedness of Fourier Integral Operators with complex phases on Fourier Lebesgue spaces
summary: In this paper, we develop boundedness estimates for Fourier integral operators on Fourier Lebesgue spaces when the associated canonical relation is parametrised by a complex phase function. Our result constitutes the complex analogue of those obtained for real canonical relations by Rodino, Nicola, and Cordero. We prove that, under the spatial factorization condition of rank $\varkappa$, the corresponding Fourier integral operator is bounded on the Fourier Lebesgue space $\mathcal{F}L^p,$ provided that the order $m$ of the operator satisfies that $ m \leq -\varkappa\left|\frac{1}{p}-\frac{1}{2}\right|, 1 \leq p \leq \infty. $ This condition on the order $m$ is sharp.

AI.tldr: 建立了复相函数参数化正则关系的傅里叶积分算子在傅里叶Lebesgue空间上的有界性估计
AI.motivation: 研究复相函数参数化正则关系的傅里叶积分算子的有界性，这是Rodino、Nicola和Cordero关于实正则关系结果的复推广，扩展了傅里叶积分算子理论到复相函数情形
AI.techniques: 使用复相函数理论、空间分解条件、傅里叶Lebesgue空间理论，以及实情形结果的复推广技术
AI.main_theorems: 在秩为ϰ的空间分解条件下，对应傅里叶积分算子在傅里叶Lebesgue空间F L^p上有界，当且仅当算子的阶m满足m ≤ -ϰ|1/p - 1/2|，且该条件是最优的
AI.significance: 将实正则关系的傅里叶积分算子有界性理论推广到复相函数情形，为复相函数参数化正则关系的算子理论提供了基础，在偏微分方程和调和分析中有重要应用

title: Global boundedness and absorbing sets in two-dimensional chemotaxis-Navier-Stokes systems with weakly singular sensitivity and a sub-logistic source
summary:
This paper studies the following chemotaxis-fluid system in a two-dimensional bounded domain $Ω$:  egin{equation*}
   egin{cases}
  n_t + u \cdot 
abla n &= Δn - χ
abla \cdot \left (n  rac{
abla c}{c^k} ight ) + r n -  rac{μn^2}{\log^η(n+e)},
  c_t + u \cdot 
abla c &= Δc - αc + βn,
  u_t + u \cdot 
abla u &= Δu - 
abla P + n 
abla φ+ f,
  
abla \cdot u &= 0,
  \end{cases} \end{equation*} where $r, μ, α, β, χ$ are positive parameters, $k, η\in (0,1)$, $φ\in W^{2,\infty}(Ω)$, and $f \in C^1\left( arΩ	imes [0, \infty)ight) \cap L^\infty\left(Ω	imes (0, \infty)ight)$. We show that, under suitable conditions on the initial data and with no-flux/no-flux/Dirichlet boundary conditions, this system admits a globally bounded classical solution. Furthermore, the system possesses an absorbing set in the topology of $C^0( arΩ) 	imes W^{1, \infty}(Ω) 	imes C^0( arΩ; \mathbb{R}^2)$.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有对数修正的二维趋化-流体耦合系统存在全局有界经典解和吸收集
AI.motivation: 研究具有对数修正的趋化-流体耦合系统的全局适定性问题，该模型描述了细胞在化学信号梯度（趋化性）和流体环境中的动力学行为，其中对数项用于防止奇异性
AI.techniques: 使用能量估计、正则化方法、最大模估计和吸收集理论，处理非线性对数修正项和趋化-流体耦合效应
AI.main_theorems: 在适当的初值条件和无通量/Dirichlet边界条件下，系统存在全局有界经典解，并且在$C^0(\barΩ) \times W^{1, \infty}(Ω) \times C^0(\barΩ; \mathbb{R}^2)$拓扑中存在吸收集
AI.significance: 扩展了趋化-流体系统的全局适定性理论，对数修正项提供了防止爆破的新机制，为生物流体动力学中的趋化现象建模提供了数学基础

title: On exact Observability for Compactly perturbed infinite dimension system
summary: In this paper, we study the observability of compactly perturbed infinite dimensional systems. Assuming that a given infinite-dimensional system with self-adjoint generator is exactly observable we derive sufficient conditions on a compact self adjoint perturbation to guarantee that the perturbed system stays exactly observable. The analysis is based on a careful asymptotic estimation of the spectral elements of the perturbed unbounded operator in terms of the compact perturbation. These intermediate results are of importance themselves.

AI.tldr: 研究了紧扰动下无限维系统的可观性保持问题，给出了紧自伴扰动保持系统精确可观性的充分条件
AI.motivation: 研究无限维动力系统的可观性在紧扰动下的稳定性问题，当原系统具有自伴生成元且精确可观时，探讨紧自伴扰动在何种条件下能保持系统的精确可观性
AI.techniques: 基于紧扰动下无界算子谱元素的渐近估计，通过谱分析技术研究扰动对系统可观性的影响
AI.main_theorems: 建立了紧自伴扰动保持系统精确可观性的充分条件，并给出了扰动算子谱元素的渐近估计结果
AI.significance: 为无限维控制系统理论提供了重要的扰动分析工具，对理解紧扰动下系统性质的稳定性有重要理论意义
